title: Playit Companion
description: Make your worlds public easily. A Minecraft plugin and mod for playit.gg.
body: Playit Companion is an open-source plugin and mod for Minecraft: Java Edition that makes your server publicly accessible over the internet—no port forwarding required. Sponsored and powered by playit.gg, it removes the hassle of opening your world to others. Created by the developer of e4mc, this project provides a simple, reliable way to host and play Minecraft with friends.
